subcodes.title: Words to Lua Getsinger, spoken on 1904-04-27
subcodes.first_line: God possesses the attributes of both justice and mercy. Justice demands that bounty be given to all equally
subcodes.subjects: @justice and mercy, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @diversity an attribute; requirement of existence, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @many are called but few are chosen, @development of capacity and readiness, @knowledge; recognition of God, @differences in human capacity, @Mary Magdalene
